title: Klaviyo vs AWeber (2025): Which Is Better?
meta_description: Compare Klaviyo and AWeber email marketing tools. See pricing, features, and which platform suits your business.
intro: Klaviyo and AWeber are both established email marketing platforms offering free tiers, but they serve different audiences. Klaviyo specializes in e-commerce automation with advanced features, while AWeber focuses on simplicity for bloggers and small businesses. This comparison helps you determine which tool aligns best with your marketing needs.
choose_a_if: You run an e-commerce store on Shopify or WooCommerce and need advanced integrations
Predictive analytics and SMS marketing are priorities for your business
You want sophisticated segmentation and automated customer flows
choose_b_if: You're a beginner or solopreneur looking for simplicity and affordability
You need RSS-to-email automation or landing page builders
You want an affiliate program to monetize referrals

faq.a: Klaviyo is more powerful for e-commerce brands with advanced automation and predictive analytics, earning a higher G2 rating (4.6 vs 4.2). However, AWeber is better for beginners seeking simplicity and lower costs. The best choice depends on your specific business needs.

faq.q: Which is cheaper, Klaviyo or AWeber?
faq.a: AWeber is significantly cheaper, starting at $15/month compared to Klaviyo's $45/month. Both offer free tiers for up to 500 subscribers, making them accessible for testing before upgrading.

faq.q: Can I switch from AWeber to Klaviyo?
faq.a: Yes, both platforms allow you to export your subscriber lists. Most email marketing tools support standard CSV imports, making migration relatively straightforward. However, you'll need to manually recreate automations and campaigns in the new platform.
